title: Smoky Roast Beef with Pistachio Crust
description: A keto-friendly dish featuring a smoky roast beef topped with a crunchy pistachio crust. Perfect for a low-carb dinner.
instructions: Season the roast beef with salt and pepper.
Place the roast beef in a roasting pan and roast for 20 minutes per pound, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
While the roast beef is cooking, mix the chopped pistachios and crumbled Canadian bacon in a bowl.
After the roast beef has cooked for 30 minutes, sprinkle the pistachio and Canadian bacon mixture evenly over the top.
Return the roast beef to the oven and continue cooking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the pistachio crust is golden brown.
Remove the roast beef from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
